description: Generate three comprehensive technical documentation files covering workflow:plan, workflow:lite-plan, and issue:plan implementation patterns with complete code references, architecture diagrams, and integration details.
approach: Systematic analysis of command definitions, agent implementations, server routes, and schema files to document: (1) slash command registration and entry points, (2) skill integration mechanisms, (3) JSON schema validation, (4) CCW server interaction patterns, (5) agent orchestration, and (6) discovery/analysis methods (ACE, Gemini CLI). Each document includes architecture diagrams, code references with file:line locations, and implementation evidence.

tasks.title: Document workflow:plan implementation patterns
tasks.description: Generate comprehensive technical documentation for /workflow:plan command covering 5-phase orchestration, slash command registration, skill integration, JSON schema usage, CCW server interaction, and agent coordination patterns.

modification_points.change: Extract implementation patterns from command definition
Analyze CLI entry point and routing

implementation: Read .claude/commands/workflow/plan.md to extract 5-phase execution model, TodoWrite pattern, and auto-continue mechanism
Analyze ccw/src/commands/workflow.ts to identify command registration and argument parsing
Search for SlashCommand invocations in plan.md to document phase transitions
Review .claude/agents/action-planning-agent.md to understand agent role in Phase 4
Examine ccw/src/core/routes/cli-routes.ts to document CLI tool execution and streaming
Read plan-json-schema.json to document task structure and validation rules
Create architecture diagram showing: User Input → Phase 1 (Session) → Phase 2 (Context) → Phase 3 (Conflict) → Phase 4 (Tasks) → Output
Document modification_points format and how tasks reference specific code locations
Include code snippets showing: TodoWrite initialization, SlashCommand execution, agent task attachment/collapse pattern
Reference specific file:line locations for all implementation details

unit: Verify all referenced files exist in codebase
Validate JSON schema examples match actual schema definition
Check that all code snippets are syntactically correct

criteria: Document includes complete 5-phase execution flow with phase descriptions
All 5 slash commands referenced with their purposes documented
TodoWrite pattern explained with task attachment/collapse mechanism
Agent coordination documented with specific agent types and roles
JSON schema structure documented with field descriptions and validation rules
Architecture diagram included showing phase transitions and data flow
Minimum 15 code references with file:line locations
Modification_points format documented with examples
verification: Read generated document and verify all phases are covered
Check that each phase has corresponding command/agent documented
Validate that code references point to actual implementations
Confirm architecture diagram matches execution flow description

commit.message_template: docs: Document workflow:plan implementation patterns with 5-phase orchestration, agent coordination, and schema validation

tasks.title: Create consolidated implementation patterns reference guide
tasks.description: Generate a consolidated reference guide documenting common patterns across all three workflows: slash command registration, skill integration, JSON schema validation, CCW server interaction, agent orchestration, and discovery methods.
implementation: Analyze common patterns across workflow:plan, workflow:lite-plan, and issue:plan
Document slash command registration pattern: command.json → CLI routing → handler execution
Document skill integration pattern: SlashCommand invocation → agent spawning → result parsing
Document JSON schema pattern: schema definition → validation → task generation
Document CCW server interaction pattern: HTTP routes → CLI execution → streaming output
Document agent orchestration pattern: agent spawning → parallel execution → result aggregation
Document discovery methods: ACE semantic search, Gemini CLI analysis, ripgrep fallback
Create comparison table showing: workflow type, phases, agents, schemas, entry points
Document error handling patterns across all three workflows
Include decision trees for: complexity assessment, exploration triggers, planning strategy selection
Create reference section for all JSON schemas used (plan-json-schema, solution-schema, fix-plan-schema)
Document CLI tool integration patterns (gemini, qwen, codex, claude)

unit: Verify all patterns are documented with examples
Check that comparison table is accurate
Validate that decision trees match actual implementation

criteria: Consolidated guide includes all common patterns across three workflows
Slash command registration pattern documented with examples
Skill integration pattern documented with agent spawning details
JSON schema validation pattern documented with all schema types
CCW server interaction pattern documented with route examples
Agent orchestration pattern documented with parallel execution details
Discovery methods documented with tool selection criteria
Comparison table includes: workflow type, phases, agents, schemas, entry points
Error handling patterns documented for each workflow type
Decision trees included for: complexity, exploration, planning strategy
Reference section includes all JSON schemas with field descriptions
Minimum 20 code references with file:line locations
verification: Read consolidated guide and verify all patterns are covered
Check that examples are consistent across workflows
Validate that comparison table is accurate and complete

commit.message_template: docs: Create consolidated workflow implementation patterns reference guide
